query: SELECT b.id, b.title, b.category, COUNT(bc.id) as character_count, GROUP_CONCAT(bc.name) as characters FROM books b LEFT JOIN bookCharacters bc ON b.id = bc.bookId GROUP BY b.id HAVING character_count > 1 ORDER BY character_count DESC LIMIT 20
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user YjcbNGfyMCcwqGq.root --database cuoraNs8SGWCiJUcwSXm4W --execute SELECT b.id, b.title, b.category, COUNT(bc.id) as character_count, GROUP_CONCAT(bc.name) as characters FROM books b LEFT JOIN bookCharacters bc ON b.id = bc.bookId GROUP BY b.id HAVING character_count > 1 ORDER BY character_count DESC LIMIT 20
